creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
Ok, let's imagine the following scenario:
Someone needs SQLLOG option, he turns it on. All is good. But then he
needs to install subversion (or maybe some other ports), and this
fails.
I don't sure now that registering SQLLOG option as BROKEN is correct.
But turning that option on breaks at list one port.
Maybe we must test&patch all sqllite3 dependant ports?
